sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 1 (Multiple Choice) & Paper 2 (Structured Questions), Price elasticity of demand often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
